title: lastrea rudis
intro: Lastrea rudis, also known as the Rough Fern or Rough Ostrich Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lastrea rudis include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate pain, making it a valuable herbal remedy in many cultures. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
